# Manipuri AI

> The first ChatGPT-style AI chatbot fluent in Manipuri (Meiteilon) and English, with support for Latin, Bengali, and Meitei Mayek (ꯃꯤꯇꯩ ꯃꯌꯦꯛ) scripts.

Manipuri AI is a bilingual conversational AI built by Loitam Leonath for speakers of Meiteilon (the official language of Manipur, India). It auto-detects the user's language and replies in the same script — Latin romanized Manipuri, Bengali script, Meitei Mayek, or English. Features include word-by-word streaming replies, voice mode (STT + TTS), AI image generation, persistent memory, and community-driven language corrections.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Landing page — features, capabilities, sign in / try links
- [Try Manipuri AI](/try): Free guest chat (no signup, 3 free messages)
- [Sign in](/auth): Email or Google authentication
- [Plans & Pricing](/plans): Free, Pro (₹99/month), Max (₹399/month)

- [Contact developer on Telegram](https://t.me/MrLeona)
